headline: Risk-on intact: META/COIN/RDDT lead; semis (LRCX -11%, KLAC -11%) hammered on rotation

market_state.line: SPY +0.2% above 50d, QQQ -1% — semi selloff dragging Nasdaq; VXX stress ratio 0.94 = low vol. Momentum longs viable, semi longs avoid.

actions.line: Full size. Dual catalyst: technicals + newsflow. Unanimous desk, clean regime. R:R ~2:1.
Half size. Clean technical setup, no fresh catalyst. Signal + risk agree, research neutral.
Quarter size. Newsflow real but overbought concern flagged — split desk, tight leash.

watch.line: LRCX -10.8% on elevated volume — semi sector under pressure, watch for oversold bounce setup.
KLAC -10.6% confirming broad semi rotation; no entry yet, needs stabilization.
CRWV -12.7% continues yesterday's dump, rel vol 1.82 — potential dead-cat watch.
COIN +11.3% MACD bullish, crypto bid; not a desk take but actionable if Bitcoin holds.
NKE +3% on quarterly results — consumer staples/discretionary read-through worth monitoring.

changed: Semi selloff (LRCX -11%, KLAC -11%) now the dominant risk — not flagged prior scan
CRWV extends losses (-12.7%) vs yesterday's -13% catalyst
MSTR +12% and COIN +11% signal crypto bid emerging as new leadership
caveats: RTH scan as of 13:20 ET — prices reflect intraday snapshot, levels may have moved materially by read time
QQQ -1% divergence from SPY in a 'risk-on' regime signals semi-specific rotation, not broad risk-off — treat sector calls accordingly
